complexityThresholds._doc: Numeric complexity score gates. fleet=[0,0.3), haiku=[0.3,0.7), premium=[0.7,1.0]

free-cloud._doc: #2619: $0 cloud failover used when fleet is UNREACHABLE (availability failure), before any paid tier. Ordered free providers; see skills/openrouter-free-failover.

capability_matrix._doc: Per-dimension tier thresholds. Manager uses this for ticket assignment.

reasoning_depth.haiku: 2-3 step reasoning, structured output with schema

code_complexity.fleet: autocomplete, boilerplate, single-function (<30 lines), config gen
code_complexity.haiku: single-file refactor, test generation, bug fix with clear root cause
code_complexity.premium: multi-file refactor, cross-module debugging, architecture design

context_length.premium: >32K tokens or coherence across large context required

tool_call_chain.fleet: 1-2 tool calls, well-specified inputs, structured outputs
tool_call_chain.haiku: 3-4 tool calls with retry, moderate output variance
tool_call_chain.premium: 5+ tool calls, long-horizon agent plan, error amplification risk

ambiguity_level.fleet: well-specified with clear output schema, in-distribution task
ambiguity_level.haiku: multi-constraint with some ambiguity, defined acceptance criteria
ambiguity_level.premium: underspecified, competing constraints, OOD novel task

fallback.note: Set OLLAMA_KEEP_ALIVE=24h on this host — see research/ollama-keepalive-runbook.md

reasoning.note: CPU-offloaded 32B reasoning; mutually exclusive with qwen2.5-coder:32b. Use for Consultant critique and architecture review. G3>G7: zero cost accepted over throughput.

judge._doc: Layer 2 judge gate: qwen3:32b on 36gbwinresource. Provides reasoning-quality evaluation for fleet responses.

per_role_lane_preferences._doc: Per-role preferred lane by complexity tier. Consumed by resolveRouting when opts.role is set. Refs #2320.

manager._rationale: Scoping novel work requires premium at high complexity; templatable tasks are fleet-eligible.

collaborator._rationale: Known-pattern implementation defaults fleet; multi-file novel work escalates to haiku.

admin._rationale: CI ops and deploy verification are templatable; git/release rarely needs above haiku.

consultant._rationale: Critique needs independent reasoning; fleet for routine closeout; premium for novel G1-G9 rubric.

it._rationale: IT-ops maintenance fully fleet-eligible per D3. Escalate only on direct-to-premium trigger.

red-team._rationale: Cross-family adversarial review prefers fleet (qwen2.5-coder). Haiku ceiling for high-complexity exploit reasoning.

fleet_dev_deny_paths._rationale: Least-Agency (OWASP-2026, design D9): high-blast-radius paths are OFF-LIMITS to autonomous fleet-development regardless of measured capability. Only senior-tier (premium) or human may author. Canonicalized substring/segment matching by scripts/global/fleet-dev-deny-paths.js (URI-decode + NFKC + non-ASCII fail-closed). Precision is SECURITY-FIRST: a false positive only escalates legit work to premium (G3 cost, acceptable); a false negative is a breach (unacceptable) — so patterns err broad. Edits are CODEOWNERS-governed via the /scripts/global/ entry.

code_dev_profile_meta._currency_note: Per-model code_dev_profile values are DATED ESTIMATES (D6), not hard guarantees — refresh from public SWE-bench Verified leaderboards + local eval when a model is upgraded. Consumed by scripts/global/fleet-dev-eligibility.js.

qwen2.5-coder:32b.source: public SWE-bench Verified leaderboard range (estimate; refresh per D6)

qwen2.5-coder:7b.source: public benchmark range (estimate; refresh per D6)
